response.justification: Bogdan has outstanding and highly relevant experience in the geospatial domain, including founding his own Geo-Data platform (GISCollective). His work with Dlang on low-latency, high-throughput systems demonstrates strong systems programming skills analogous to C++. However, his professional C++ experience is nearly a decade old and it is not listed as a current skill, which is a major deviation from the primary requirement of the role. An interview is necessary to assess his current C++ proficiency and his potential to quickly become productive in a modern C++ environment.
strengths: Extensive, self-directed experience in the geospatial domain through founding and developing GISCollective.
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-performance applications using a systems language (Dlang).
Demonstrates versatility and a proactive learning attitude by working across diverse tech stacks and initiating projects.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is from 2015 and is not listed in his current skills section, indicating a lack of recent expertise.
Resume lacks specific experience with routing algorithms, data tiling, or navigation pipelines, which are core to the role.
Recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, not the C++ or Rust specified in the job description.
